data.body: Investigation findings: Each ticket operation takes ~440ms (python3 flock + realpath ~50ms, git add ~30ms, git commit ~200ms, bash overhead ~160ms). Transition test: 20 repos × 0.45s + 57 ops × 0.44s = 34s theoretical (26.6s actual with overlap). Key optimizations: (1) replace python3 realpath with cd+pwd -P (~30ms saved/op), (2) cache gc.auto=0 once per repo instead of per-op (~10ms saved/op), (3) reduce test-test-batched.sh sleeps (~8s).
